channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Florida sheriff identifies body found in Tampa Bay as 2nd missing student from Bangladesh
item.description: A Florida sheriff says a body found in Tampa Bay has been identified as the second missing University of South Florida doctoral student from Bangladesh.

item.title: Kentucky man charged in deadly bank robbery after high-speed chase
What to know about May Day demonstrations as workers face rising energy costs due to Iran war
